title: Triage assessments
description: One conservative symptom-triage observation written by the care/triage-nurse, grounded strictly in the curated triage knowledge (red-flags, when-to-see-a-doctor) — never the open web. It reports an urgency level and what to watch for; it never diagnoses. Not medical advice.

symptomId.description: the symptom this assessment is about (null for a free-text question)

question.description: the user's triage question, e.g. 'chest tightness after climbing stairs'

body.description: the observation in markdown, ending with an explicit 'if X, seek care now' line; empty while pending

status.description: 'pending' while the triage-nurse assesses it, 'ready' when done

symptom.description: the symptom episode this assessment concerns
